function G(G)return F[G+(-147094+192372)]end for G,s in ipairs({{-926329+926330;49597-49330};{194147+-194146,174339-174292};{649283-649235,-598923+599190}})do while local G=string.len local s=table.concat local E=math.floor local S=string.char local P=type local return(function(F,E,S,P,D,j,W,s,x,A,i,X,L,Z,q,U,K,I,J,z,a,p,M,y)x,J,p,i,y,X,A,U,s,q,Z,K,L,M,z,I,a=function(F,G)local E=Z(G)local S=function(S,P,D,j)return s(F,{S,P,D,j},G,E)end return S
